title: Slack Login Issue
description: Troubleshooting steps for users unable to log into Slack.

steps.title: Check Credentials
steps.instruction: Verify that your email and password are correct. Ensure Caps Lock is off.

steps.title: Clear Browser Cache / App Data
steps.instruction: If using the web version, clear your browser cache. If using the desktop app, go to Help -> Troubleshooting -> Clear Cache and Restart.

steps.title: SSO / Workspace URL
steps.instruction: Ensure you are logging into the correct workspace URL (e.g., desicrew.slack.com) and using Single Sign-On (SSO) if required by the company.

steps.title: Update Slack App
steps.instruction: If you are using the desktop or mobile app, ensure it is updated to the latest version.

steps.title: Contact IT Support
steps.instruction: If you are still unable to log in, your account might be disabled or require a password reset. Please raise a ticket.
